response.overview: Steve and Morgan are best friends, but they're also murdering psychopathic butchers, who sell their victims' body parts on the black market. The duo shows up in the big city hoping to impress a powerful crime boss with their finest "product." There's just one problem: they forgot the body. Desperate to fix their mistake, they hatch a nearly-genius plan that quickly spirals out of control. Now, Steve and Morgan must fight to survive before they're the ones on the chopping block. The Butchers is a darkly absurd, high-stakes thrill ride that blends escalating tension with dark comedy, proving that sometimes the biggest threat to a perfect plan is your own stupidity.
response.title: The Butchers
